zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston於大約1425年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓時，他的父親Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston41歲，母親Jane D'Artois22歲。他於1447年與Joan Molyneux在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯德爾文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1493年被列為he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland。他去世於1503年4月9日在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston于大约1425年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓时，他的父亲Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston41岁，母亲Jane D'Artois22岁。他于1447年与Joan Molyneux在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯德爾文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1493年被列为he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland。他去世于1503年4月9日在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston was born about 1425, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston, was 41 and his mother, Jane D'Artois, was 22. He married Joan Molyneux in 1447, in Delvin, County Westmeath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1493, at the age of 69, his occupation is listed as he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland. He died on 9 April 1503, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston est né environ 1425, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Jane D'Artois, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Molyneux en 1447, à Delvin, County Westmeath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1493, à l’âge de 69 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1503, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston um 1425 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston 41 und seine Mutter Jane D'Artois 22. Er hat 1447 in Delvin, County Westmeath, Irland Joan Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1493, als er 69 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. April 1503 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston è nato il circa 1425 nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Jane D'Artois, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan Molyneux nel 1447, nel Delvin, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1493, all'età di 69 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland. Morì il 9 aprile 1503, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanstonが約1425年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで生まれた時，父Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanstonは41歳，母Jane D'Artoisは22歳であった。1447年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスデルヴィンでJoan Molyneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1493年，69歳の時，職業はhe held the office of deputy chief governor of irelandと記録されている。彼は1503年4月9日に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston(이)가 대략 1425년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane D'Artois(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1447년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 델빈에서 Joan Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1493년, 69세의 나이로 그의 직업은 he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland이었다. 그는 1503년 4월 9일 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston nasceu aproximadamente 1425, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Jane D'Artois, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Molyneux em 1447, em Delvin, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1493, com 69 anos, sua profissão aparece como he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1503, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston родился около 1425 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Jane D'Artois, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Molyneux в 1447 г. в местности дельвин, коунти вестмит, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1493 году, в возрасте 69 лет,  он работал по профессии he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland. Он умер 9 апреля 1503 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Preston 1st Viscount Gormanston nació aproximadamente 1425, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Jane D'Artois, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan Molyneux en 1447, en Delvin, County Westmeath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1493, a la edad de 69 años, su ocupación registrada era he held the office of deputy chief governor of ireland. Murió el 9 de abril de 1503, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
